name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I'm running for president
body:
I hear you. I'm listening. And it's why I'm running.
| | |
---
Peter, defending and perfecting our democracy is a choice we make again and again, and today I'm announcing I'm running for president because my choice is to stand up, fight for it and speak out for our future.
By coming together to build a movement and win in 2020, we'll get back to the truth of who we are. We'll reject self service and return to public service. We will summon the bravery at the heart of our history to root out attacks based on fear. You'll have leadership who hears you, because that's always the place to start.
As I've prepared for this moment, I've traveled across the country, from Sioux City to Concord to Houston to Charleston. I've met people in homes, cafes and breweries. I've asked: What do you and your community need? And I carry your answers and stories with me.
I will fight, from day one in office, for a Green New Deal. We have to keep our air and water safe and protect the future of our planet. We will pass Medicare for All and universal paid family leave, and we will confront the NRA to finally address gun violence and make our communities safer.
None of this is possible without taking on the corporations and special interests that have exploited the common good for their own profit. **So bring them on.** We're going to do this without support from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or a super PAC. We're going to do it together, as a movement of the people.
**[Click here to be part of this movement from the beginning, by donating on day one of my campaign for president of the United States. Your gift will give power to our grassroots fight for families like yours and a proud, progressive, democratic future.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976ab9/2ae112ef/12a9c039/357d2658/1079130636/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI4NzUtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2875-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
You can count on me to see this fight through because that's what I've always done.
I've been fighting for more accountability since I got to Congress. I was the first member to post my daily meetings, financial disclosures and taxes publicly.
I have the most anti-Trump voting record in the entire Senate. It wasn't anything I set out to do, but a result of asking myself each time: Will this law or cabinet official help or hurt people?
As president, I'll ask the opposite: How can we make people's lives better?
We're going to defeat Trump, but we also have to take on everything he represents. The division and finger-pointing. The corruption and self-dealing. The sense that Washington doesn't care and has stopped listening.
I hear you. I'm listening. And it's why I'm running.
But like any effort to turn the tides of history, we'll only succeed if we do this together. **[Take a moment--before midnight--to donate any amount you can and claim your place in this movement. ](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976ab9/2ae112ef/12a9c039/357d2658/1079130636/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI4NzUtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2875-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Give $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2875-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| [Give $25](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2875-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [Give $50](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2875-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| [Give $100](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2875-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Give $250](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2875-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| [Give another amount](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976ab9/2ae112ef/12a9c039/357d2658/1079130636/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI4NzUtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2875-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
From the bottom of my heart, thank you,
Kirsten
| | If there are issues important to you, I want to hear about them. **[Take a moment to fill out a brief survey and make your story part of our fight.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg2020-march-priorities?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2875-fr-gfp-nd") **
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976ab9/2ae112ef/12a9c039/357d264f/1079130636/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
---

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Our story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[2]Beto for America

Almost two years ago, Beto started a very different kind of campaign.

[1]Beto and family

We set out to listen to people in 254 counties. People who hadn’t been
listened to in a long time.

[2]Beto and a big crowd

Along the way, our team grew and grew. People started volunteering at
levels we’d never seen before. Opening up their homes, knocking doors.

[3]Volunteers stepping up to lead Beto's campaign

We raised a record-breaking amount of money from ALL people -- not a dime
from PACs or corporations.

[4]News report on Beto's incredible fundraising

We built the biggest grassroots campaign of the election and shattered the
midterm record for voter turnout.

Beto received more votes than any Democrat in Texas history.

[5]HUGE rally for Beto

But our story is not over. It’s just beginning.

Beto is running for president to build a movement with all of us.

[6]Beto is running for us

We know that together we can defeat the anxiety that dominates political
life today. We can be defined not by our fears, but by our ambitions.

We can take back the White House and bring about real, lasting change.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/16929?refcode=ema20190317&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=25103%2E444211%2EOjEnmf ]We will win only if we build the nation’s largest grassroots campaign
to reach every voter. Can you contribute $5
now?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/16929?refcode=ema20190317&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=25103%2E444211%2EOjEnmf ]Contribute
$5
now »

Remember this campaign only accepts donations from people. No PACs. No
corporations. No lobbyists. ALL people. We rely on your support.

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20190317footer&t=1004&refcode2=25103_444211_OjEnmf&akid=25103%2E444211%2EOjEnmf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=25103%2E444211%2EOjEnmf

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Tina Smith
subject: Before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Please read.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march?refcode=rtw_20190317_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Hi friend, We're two weeks away from our first public filing deadline of 2019, and here's where we stand:
* A GOP memo to their wealthy donors on 2020 Senate races confirmed there are "a number of strong candidates looking to take [me] on, including Karin Housley."
* _NBC News_ said we are a race to watch.
* We're $4,332 behind where we need to be **_by midnight tonight_** to stay on track and hit our March fundraising goal.

**[I'm personally asking you to chip in $10 right now to help us close our fundraising gap. Your contribution today allows us to hire more staff, expand our field operation, and reach voters in every corner of the state.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march?refcode=rtw_20190317_em&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** If we put up a strong first quarter fundraising number, we'll send a message that progressives like you are ready to fight. And we'll send a message that -- no matter how many billionaire and dark money donors they have on the other side -- this U.S. Senate seat cannot be bought. But if we fall short, we'll only be empowering the candidates on the other side who are thinking about going up against me. We can't let that happen. **So I 'm asking: Will you chip in $10 before midnight tonight? Here's a link to pitch in: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march?refcode=rtw_20190317_em&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** After Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016, we can't risk anything in 2020. I'm counting on grassroots donors like you to help us keep fighting for Minnesota. Let's do this, Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march?refcode=rtw_20190317_em-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d904/c1f7015/6135f75f/11404156/4106310562/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---

St. Paul, MN 55114

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: We really want to go for this
body:
This will shock a lot of people.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=753%2E150750%2EZ8JaVz)

Sisters and Brothers -
Two weeks from today, we close the books on the first official fundraising deadline of our campaign. Shortly after, we’ll report how much money we’ve raised and how many **_individual donations**_ got us to that number.
We have an audacious goal in mind for that deadline. One we hesitate to share today because, frankly, it’s probably a bit out of reach...
But we’d love to go for it. Because if we got there ... we can only tell you the political establishment and corporate media would be absolutely floored.
If we have a good day today, we’ll have a chance. So we’re looking for as many individual donations as we can get before midnight. Then we’ll make a decision on whether or not to go for it. So we’re asking:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign as we approach the end of our first official FEC fundraising deadline? The report we put out will send a very important message about why we’re the best campaign to beat Trump.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10096?refcode=em190317-1-120-full&t=26&akid=753%2E150750%2EZ8JaVz)
This report is so important. Everyone will be looking at it to help determine which campaign has the best chance to beat Trump. And that means a lot to primary and caucus-goers. So please, help file a report that will make it clear we are that campaign.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10096?refcode=em190317-1-120-full&t=27&akid=753%2E150750%2EZ8JaVz)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe using this link**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=753%2E150750%2EZ8JaVz). But we hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

We have an official FEC fundraising deadline coming up and we're trying to report as many individual donations as we possibly can. [**Make a contribution today before the FEC deadline comes to a close.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer-march-deadline&t=29&refcode2=753_150750_Z8JaVz&akid=753%2E150750%2EZ8JaVz).

Because if we got there ... we can only tell you the political establishment and corporate media would be absolutely floored. If we have a good day today, we’ll have a chance. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Emmer Voted to Continue Fueling War on Yemen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# The War in Yemen is a Crisis.

This week a bipartisan resolution passed to end the United States' support of Saudia Arabia in their starvation war on Yemen. Saudia Arabia has been targeting civilians and driving an entire nation into crippling starvation, and Congress has resolved to pull out support from Saudia Arabia in Yemen for their inhumane acts of violence. Despite the bipartisanship of the effort to end our support, Tom Emmer voted against the resolution; he voted to continue our role in this brutal occupation of innocent civilians.

As a veteran, I understand the cost of war, but even in war, the United States needs to continue to hold itself and its allies to a high moral standard. We cannot allow the desire to profit off of weapons sales to blind us to our own moral values. Its time to let Saudia Arabia know that we will not support their starvation war on Yemen, and its time to hold Tom Emmer accountable.

Your friend,

_Ian A. Todd_
